description: Locked launch packs. 5 packs only — all contents map to live or near-live modules in product/modules/. Any pack added in the future must pass the promotion rule documented in docs/architecture/SERVICE_AUTOMATION_PRODUCT_ARCHITECTURE.md (>=3 live modules, clear buyer job, instant/guided activation, real usage).

packs.note: At $49 this is a $8 savings vs. buying modules individually. Formula row for 3 modules.
Smallest pack. Kept as a standalone SKU because reviews is a clear standalone buyer job.
Expands to 3 modules ($49) when lost_deal_reactivation graduates from sales into the retention pack, or when a seasonal-reminder module is built.

not_launching_yet.reason: Only 1 live module (estimate_followup). proposal_view_tracker and lost_deal_reactivation exist but need a 3rd module (lead_assignment) before this earns pack status.
No dedicated modules yet. Speed-to-lead, voicemail, and after-hours autoresponder live in lead-response, not a standalone communication concept.
No live modules (task alerts, job-status triggers, handoff alerts not yet built).

pack_pricing_formula.rule: Pack price must always be less than sum of constituent module prices ($19 each). See product/pricing/tiers.json pricing_rules.
